SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.models

Class AutomationRuleMessage

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage
public class AutomationRuleMessage extends Object
Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.

Wraps an automation rule operation — add, remove, or toggle — so that both follower coordinators and the Automation Hub receive and act on the same message from a single publish by the leader.

Published by the leader coordinator inside a Message<AutomationRuleMessage> after validating and storing the rule locally. Subscribers handle each operation type as follows:

  • Follower coordinators — mirror the operation against their local automation rule list so their state stays in sync with the leader. If a follower wins a subsequent election it will have the full, current rule set.
  • Automation Hub — applies the operation to its active rule registry: IAutomationHub.addRule(AutomationRule) for ADD, IAutomationHub.removeRule(String) for REMOVE, and IAutomationHub.setRuleActive(String, boolean) for TOGGLE.

Operation semantics

  • ADD — rule is populated; ruleId and active are ignored (the ID is inside the rule object).
  • REMOVE — ruleId identifies the rule to delete; rule and active are ignored.
  • TOGGLE — ruleId identifies the rule; active is the new enabled/disabled state; rule is ignored.

    AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
    The type of automation rule operation carried by this message.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static AutomationRuleMessage
    add(AutomationRule rule)
    Creates an ADD message carrying the full rule to register.
    AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
    getOperation()
    Returns the operation type carried by this message.
    AutomationRule
    getRule()
    Returns the full automation rule for an ADD operation.

    Returns the rule ID for REMOVE and TOGGLE operations.

    Returns the target active state for a TOGGLE operation.
    static AutomationRuleMessage

    Creates a REMOVE message targeting a rule by ID.

  • Method Details

    • add

      public static AutomationRuleMessage add(AutomationRule rule)
      Creates an ADD message carrying the full rule to register.
      Parameters:
      rule - the automation rule to add; must not be null
      Returns:
      an AutomationRuleMessage with operation ADD

    • remove

      public static AutomationRuleMessage remove(String ruleId)
      Creates a REMOVE message targeting a rule by ID.
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to remove; must not be null
      Returns:
      an AutomationRuleMessage with operation REMOVE

    • toggle

      public static AutomationRuleMessage toggle(String ruleId, boolean active)
      Creates a TOGGLE message that enables or disables a rule.
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to toggle; must not be null
      active - true to enable the rule, false to disable it
      Returns:
      an AutomationRuleMessage with operation TOGGLE

    • getOperation

      public AutomationRuleMessage.Operation getOperation()
      Returns the operation type carried by this message.
      Returns:
      ADD, REMOVE, or TOGGLE

    • getRule

      public AutomationRule getRule()
      Returns the full automation rule for an ADD operation.
      Returns:
      the rule to add, or null for REMOVE and TOGGLE

    • getRuleId

      public String getRuleId()
      Returns the rule ID for REMOVE and TOGGLE operations.
      Returns:
      the rule ID, or null for ADD

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns the target active state for a TOGGLE operation.
      Returns:
      true to enable, false to disable; always false for ADD and REMOVE (ignore this value)
